incident_summary: Operator OP-5146 performed aseptic filling technique incorrectly during batch A8514B — contacted non-sterile surface then continued filling without re-gloving. Filling proceeded for 7.0 hours.
root_cause_detail: Operator's aseptic technique requalification was overdue by {days()} days. Requalification scheduling not tracked in training management system — overdue not flagged to supervisor.
corrective_action: Batch quarantined for sterility testing. Operator removed from aseptic operations. Full aseptic technique requalification completed including media fill participation.
preventive_action: Training due dates tracked in LIMS — overdue requalification automatically locks operator from aseptic filling in EBR. Supervisor receives 30-day advance notification of upcoming requalifications.
effectiveness_check: Zero aseptic technique-related contamination events for 18 months. 100% requalification on-time compliance on monthly training report.
